mapper.select: SELECT code_group, code_field, code_before, code_after, code_description FROM code_description WHERE code_group = #{codeGroup} AND code_field = #{codeField} ORDER BY code_before
SELECT MAX(change_case_no) FROM policy_change_acceptance WHERE change_case_no LIKE CONCAT(#{changeCaseNoPrefix}, '%')

SELECT a.policy_no, a.policy_seq, a.change_case_no, a.acceptance_status, COALESCE(status_cd.code_description, a.acceptance_status) AS acceptance_status_description, GROUP_CONCAT(i.change_item ORDER BY i.change_item SEPARATOR ',') AS change_items, GROUP_CONCAT(COALESCE(cd.code_description, i.change_item) ORDER BY i.change_item SEPARATOR ',') AS change_item_descriptions FROM policy_change_acceptance a LEFT JOIN code_description status_cd ON status_cd.code_group = 'policy-change-acceptance' AND status_cd.code_field = 'acceptance_status' AND status_cd.code_before = a.acceptance_status LEFT JOIN policy_change_item i ON i.policy_no = a.policy_no AND i.policy_seq = a.policy_seq AND i.change_case_no = a.change_case_no LEFT JOIN code_description cd ON cd.code_group = 'policy-change-item' AND cd.code_field = 'change_item' AND cd.code_before = i.change_item WHERE a.policy_no = #{policyNo} GROUP BY a.policy_no, a.policy_seq, a.change_case_no, a.acceptance_status, status_cd.code_description, a.created_at ORDER BY a.created_at DESC

SELECT a.policy_no, a.policy_seq, a.change_case_no, a.acceptance_status, COALESCE(status_cd.code_description, a.acceptance_status) AS acceptance_status_description, GROUP_CONCAT(i.change_item ORDER BY i.change_item SEPARATOR ',') AS change_items, GROUP_CONCAT(COALESCE(cd.code_description, i.change_item) ORDER BY i.change_item SEPARATOR ',') AS change_item_descriptions FROM policy_change_acceptance a LEFT JOIN code_description status_cd ON status_cd.code_group = 'policy-change-acceptance' AND status_cd.code_field = 'acceptance_status' AND status_cd.code_before = a.acceptance_status LEFT JOIN policy_change_item i ON i.policy_no = a.policy_no AND i.policy_seq = a.policy_seq AND i.change_case_no = a.change_case_no LEFT JOIN code_description cd ON cd.code_group = 'policy-change-item' AND cd.code_field = 'change_item' AND cd.code_before = i.change_item WHERE a.policy_no = #{policyNo} AND a.policy_seq = #{policySeq} AND a.change_case_no = #{changeCaseNo} GROUP BY a.policy_no, a.policy_seq, a.change_case_no, a.acceptance_status, status_cd.code_description

SELECT id, policy_no, policy_seq, change_case_no, change_item, change_file, content_before, content_after FROM policy_change_file WHERE policy_no = #{policyNo} AND policy_seq = #{policySeq} AND change_case_no = #{changeCaseNo} AND change_item = #{changeItem} ORDER BY id

SELECT id, policy_no, policy_seq, change_case_no, change_item, change_field, change_key, content_before, content_after FROM policy_change_field WHERE policy_no = #{policyNo} AND policy_seq = #{policySeq} AND change_case_no = #{changeCaseNo} AND change_item = #{changeItem} ORDER BY id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO policy_change_acceptance (policy_no, policy_seq, change_case_no, acceptance_status) VALUES (#{policyNo}, #{policySeq}, #{changeCaseNo}, #{acceptanceStatus})
INSERT INTO policy_change_item (policy_no, policy_seq, change_case_no, change_item) VALUES (#{policyNo}, #{policySeq}, #{changeCaseNo}, #{changeItem})

INSERT INTO policy_change_field ( policy_no, policy_seq, change_case_no, change_item, change_field, change_key, content_before, content_after ) VALUES ( #{policyNo}, #{policySeq}, #{changeCaseNo}, #{changeItem}, #{changeField}, #{changeKey}, #{contentBefore}, #{contentAfter} )

INSERT INTO policy_change_file ( policy_no, policy_seq, change_case_no, change_item, change_file, content_before, content_after ) VALUES ( #{policyNo}, #{policySeq}, #{changeCaseNo}, #{changeItem}, #{changeFile}, #{contentBefore}, #{contentAfter} )
